description_long: This is a heavily modified van with a robust, armored exterior and aggressive styling, featuring angular body panels and prominent aerodynamic fins on the roof and rear. The front grille is wide and imposing, flanked by rectangular headlights and a reinforced bumper. The sides display multiple access doors, small side windows, and external exhaust pipes running along the lower edge. The rear is equipped with louvered vents, dual rear doors, and additional aerodynamic elements, suggesting a high-performance or tactical purpose. The wheels are reinforced and the overall body sits high above the ground, indicating off-road or urban assault capabilities. The van's color scheme is primarily matte gray, giving it a utilitarian and stealthy appearance.
description: A matte gray, armored van with aggressive aerodynamic fins, reinforced bumpers, and tactical styling. It features multiple doors, small windows, and external exhausts, suggesting a high-performance or tactical use.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide, reinforced grille, angular hood details, and prominent roof fins.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights multiple access doors, small side windows, and external exhaust pipes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays louvered vents, dual rear doors, and large aerodynamic fins.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with visible doors, windows, and exhausts.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
